githubSecrets.name: PROXMOX_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY
githubSecrets.description: SSH private key with root access to Proxmox nodes (pct + docker on LXCs)

githubSecrets.name: PROXMOX_SSH_PASSWORD
githubSecrets.description: Alternative to private key — password auth for root@Proxmox

githubSecrets.name: PROXMOX_SSH_USER
githubSecrets.description: SSH user on Proxmox nodes (default root)

githubSecrets.name: PROXMOX_SSH_HOST
githubSecrets.description: Fallback single-host Proxmox IP if both nodes share one SSH entry point

source.notes: Proxmox cluster SSH targets for Z Ecosystem LXC deployment. Set management IPs in GitHub secrets or deploy/proxmox/github-secrets.env.
